Tampa's Trusted Fence Experts

Rodney Fence provides durable, quality fencing solutions throughout the Tampa Bay area. Protect your property and enhance your curb appeal with our expert craftsmanship.

Call Now: +18133818243

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Built on Quality, Rooted in Tampa

Rodney Fence and Outdoor Services LLC began with a simple mission: to deliver exceptional fencing solutions with unwavering integrity. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of Tampa's climate and housing styles. From South Tampa bungalows to Westchase developments, we've built a reputation for exceeding expectations.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence company services.

How long does a wood fence last in Tampa?

With proper treatment and maintenance, a wood fence can last 10-15 years in Tampa's climate.

What type of wood is best for fences in Florida?

Pressure-treated pine is a common and cost-effective choice, offering good resistance to rot and insects.

Do I need a permit to build a fence in Tampa?

Yes, most fence projects in Tampa require a permit. We handle the permitting process for you.

Reviews From Our Fence Company Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Rodney Fence did an amazing job installing our new wood privacy fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and paid attention to every detail. Our backyard feels so much more private now! Highly recommend!"

Maria S. Wood Fence Installation

"We had a section of our vinyl fence damaged during a storm. Rodney Fence came out quickly and repaired it perfectly. You can't even tell it was ever damaged. Great service!"

David K. Vinyl Fence Repair

"We needed a new fence around our pool to meet code requirements. Rodney Fence installed a beautiful aluminum fence that looks great and keeps our kids safe. The team was knowledgeable and helpful throughout the process."

Jessica L. Aluminum Pool Fence
